description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoonish cow or bull, featuring a soft, rounded body covered in light brown and orange fabric. The toy has two prominent orange horns on top of its head, large blue embroidered eyes, and a white snout with two stitched nostrils. Its ears are small and rounded, with a lighter inner color, and it has a short, tufted tail at the back. The legs and arms are stubby and filled, giving the toy a cuddly and huggable appearance. The surface appears fuzzy and soft, with a gentle sheen typical of synthetic plush materials.
description: A soft, plush cow or bull stuffed toy with orange horns, blue eyes, and a white snout, covered in light brown and orange fuzzy fabric.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's large blue eyes, white snout, orange horns, and both front legs clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of the head, one visible ear, the curve of the horns, and the short tail at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, both horns, the fuzzy body, and the short tail, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other profile, including the other ear, horn, and the tail, with the snout partially visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and inviting, with large, wide blue eyes and a gentle, neutral mouth. The overall look is cheerful and approachable.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with all four limbs slightly apart and the head facing forward, giving a balanced and stable appearance.
